data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices for users to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interfaces with clear, singular tasks.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes target sizes and distances to enhance navigation efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Designs intuitive navigation elements that are easy to click.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates visually appealing interfaces that improve perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on sleek design and rich media integration.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together for better user understanding.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of buttons and menus.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information displayed to optimize cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Uses tabs and dropdowns to organize information.
